あ.mnemonic: あ is an 'A' with a cross-stroke and a curl — open wide and say "ah".

い.mnemonic: Two leaning strokes, like the two i's in " skiing " — "ee".

う.mnemonic: A nose and mouth in profile, lips pushed out to say "oo".

え.mnemonic: Looks like an exotic bird with a swoosh — "eh, exotic!".

お.mnemonic: A person doing a cartwheel — "oh!" — with a little tail.

か.mnemonic: A person swinging a sword to "cut" — "ka!".

き.mnemonic: A 'key' on its side with two teeth.

こ.mnemonic: Two short strokes, like two koi fish swimming together.

さ.mnemonic: A person sitting on a stool saying "sah".

し.mnemonic: A smiling fishing hook — picture "she" fishing.

す.mnemonic: A coiled spring / a swing — it loops down and "swoo"-ps.

せ.mnemonic: A person at a desk, all "set" to study — "seh".

た.mnemonic: A cross plus a tail — a tadpole going "tah".

ち.mnemonic: A cheerleader doing a high kick — "cheer / chi".

つ.mnemonic: A swooping hook, like a tsunami wave curling over.

て.mnemonic: Looks like a hand — and "te" means hand in Japanese.

と.mnemonic: A toe with a thorn stuck in it — "toh!".

な.mnemonic: A cross with a knot tied in it — "nah, knot now".

に.mnemonic: A person kneeling beside a needle — "knee".

ぬ.mnemonic: A swirl of "noo"-dles with a twist.

ね.mnemonic: A cat's curled tail — "neko" (cat) starts with ne.

の.mnemonic: A clean swirl, like the line through a "no-entry" sign.

は.mnemonic: A person laughing with hands raised — "ha ha!".

ひ.mnemonic: A wide grin / a big nose in profile — "hee".

ふ.mnemonic: Mt. Fuji with a little smoke — "foo".

へ.mnemonic: A simple hill or arrow — climb it and sigh "heh".

ほ.mnemonic: Like は but with an extra bar — Santa's "ho ho ho".

ま.mnemonic: A loop at the bottom, like mama's hair curl — "ma".

み.mnemonic: Looks like the number 21 with loops — "mee".

む.mnemonic: A cow with a curly tail going "muuu".

め.mnemonic: Like ぬ but a single eye-loop — "me" means eye.

も.mnemonic: A fish hook with two crossbars — catch one "more".

や.mnemonic: A yak with a single horn — "ya".

ゆ.mnemonic: A fish with a looped tail swimming "yu"-niquely.

よ.mnemonic: A yo-yo hanging on a hook — "yo!".

り.mnemonic: Two tall reeds by a river — "ree".

る.mnemonic: A loop with a curl, like a curled-up route — "rue".

れ.mnemonic: A person's bent leg flicking out — "reh".

ろ.mnemonic: Like る but no loop — a zigzag road — "roh".

わ.mnemonic: Like ね/れ but a round loop — a wide open "wah!".

を.mnemonic: Like a person doing a yoga pose — the "wo" particle.

ん.mnemonic: A single low hook — just a soft "n".

ウ.mnemonic: A roof over a head, mouth pushed out — "oo".

オ.mnemonic: A cross with a hook — like お, say "oh".

カ.mnemonic: Same idea as か — a slash to "cut" — "ka".

ク.mnemonic: A cliff edge / an open beak — "ku".

サ.mnemonic: A cross with legs — a person sitting — "sah".

シ.mnemonic: Two eyes and a wink, strokes go bottom-up — "she".

ス.mnemonic: A person sitting on a slope — "soo".

ソ.mnemonic: One dab and a stroke, top-down — "so".

チ.mnemonic: A plus sign with an arc (like ち) — "chee".

ツ.mnemonic: Two eyes and a mouth, strokes top-down — "tsu".

テ.mnemonic: Two bars on a stem (like て) — "teh".

ト.mnemonic: A 'T' with a tick — a toe — "toh".

ヌ.mnemonic: Like ス with a slash through it — "noo".

ネ.mnemonic: A little shrine with a tail — "neh".

ハ.mnemonic: Two strokes like an open mountain / an 'H' — "ha".

フ.mnemonic: A single hook — Mt. Fuji's slope — "foo".

メ.mnemonic: An 'X' — cross out what your eye ("me") sees.

モ.mnemonic: Like も — a hook with a bar — "moh".

ヨ.mnemonic: Three prongs, like a capital E / a yo-yo rack — "yo".

ル.mnemonic: A shape with two little legs running — "rue".

ン.mnemonic: Two strokes rising bottom-up (vs ソ) — a soft "n".

が.mnemonic: Same shape as か (ka); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ga.

ぎ.mnemonic: Same shape as き (ki); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → gi.

ぐ.mnemonic: Same shape as く (ku); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → gu.

げ.mnemonic: Same shape as け (ke); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ge.

ご.mnemonic: Same shape as こ (ko); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → go.

ざ.mnemonic: Same shape as さ (sa); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → za.

じ.mnemonic: Same shape as し (shi); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ji.

ず.mnemonic: Same shape as す (su); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → zu.

ぜ.mnemonic: Same shape as せ (se); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ze.

ぞ.mnemonic: Same shape as そ (so); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → zo.

だ.mnemonic: Same shape as た (ta); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → da.

ぢ.mnemonic: Same shape as ち (chi); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ji.

づ.mnemonic: Same shape as つ (tsu); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → zu.

で.mnemonic: Same shape as て (te); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → de.

ど.mnemonic: Same shape as と (to); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → do.

ば.mnemonic: Same shape as は (ha); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ba.

び.mnemonic: Same shape as ひ (hi); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → bi.

ぶ.mnemonic: Same shape as ふ (fu); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → bu.

べ.mnemonic: Same shape as へ (he); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → be.

ぼ.mnemonic: Same shape as ほ (ho); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → bo.

ぱ.mnemonic: Same shape as は (ha); the handakuten circle ゜ makes it a 'p' sound → pa.

ぴ.mnemonic: Same shape as ひ (hi); the handakuten circle ゜ makes it a 'p' sound → pi.

ぷ.mnemonic: Same shape as ふ (fu); the handakuten circle ゜ makes it a 'p' sound → pu.

ぺ.mnemonic: Same shape as へ (he); the handakuten circle ゜ makes it a 'p' sound → pe.

ぽ.mnemonic: Same shape as ほ (ho); the handakuten circle ゜ makes it a 'p' sound → po.

ガ.mnemonic: Same shape as カ (ka); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ga.

ギ.mnemonic: Same shape as キ (ki); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → gi.

グ.mnemonic: Same shape as ク (ku); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → gu.

ゲ.mnemonic: Same shape as ケ (ke); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ge.

ゴ.mnemonic: Same shape as コ (ko); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → go.

ザ.mnemonic: Same shape as サ (sa); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → za.

ジ.mnemonic: Same shape as シ (shi); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ji.

ズ.mnemonic: Same shape as ス (su); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → zu.

ゼ.mnemonic: Same shape as セ (se); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ze.

ゾ.mnemonic: Same shape as ソ (so); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → zo.

ダ.mnemonic: Same shape as タ (ta); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → da.

ヂ.mnemonic: Same shape as チ (chi); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ji.

ヅ.mnemonic: Same shape as ツ (tsu); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → zu.

デ.mnemonic: Same shape as テ (te); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → de.

ド.mnemonic: Same shape as ト (to); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → do.

バ.mnemonic: Same shape as ハ (ha); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → ba.

ビ.mnemonic: Same shape as ヒ (hi); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → bi.

ブ.mnemonic: Same shape as フ (fu); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → bu.

ベ.mnemonic: Same shape as ヘ (he); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → be.

ボ.mnemonic: Same shape as ホ (ho); the two dakuten strokes ゛ voice it → bo.

パ.mnemonic: Same shape as ハ (ha); the handakuten circle ゜ makes it a 'p' sound → pa.

ピ.mnemonic: Same shape as ヒ (hi); the handakuten circle ゜ makes it a 'p' sound → pi.

プ.mnemonic: Same shape as フ (fu); the handakuten circle ゜ makes it a 'p' sound → pu.

ペ.mnemonic: Same shape as ヘ (he); the handakuten circle ゜ makes it a 'p' sound → pe.

ポ.mnemonic: Same shape as ホ (ho); the handakuten circle ゜ makes it a 'p' sound → po.
